acceptance.assertion: A renderer-independent semantic input contract and public JSON Schema describe nodes, relations, groups, intent, requirements and requested formats.
The representation router selects or rejects Mermaid, JSON Canvas, Miro-native, table and document outputs with deterministic scores, thresholds and reasons.
A deterministic hybrid package preserves stable source identifiers, reports renderer-specific coverage and binds every artifact to SHA-256 evidence.
acceptance.verifier: byte-equality tests and final package receipt

acceptance.assertion: Mermaid source, JSON Canvas, Miro-native composition, table and document outputs are generated through one CLI path without treating any renderer as the sole source of truth.
acceptance.verifier: CLI integration tests and package manifest

acceptance.assertion: The final Miro-native projection is created on one fresh Education-context board, passes the local contract at 100 without warnings and matches remote counts exactly without altering an existing board.
acceptance.verifier: Miro live-test receipt and board binding

acceptance.assertion: Both implementation pull requests have green CI, exact reviewed-head to merge-tree identity and head- plus diff-bound critical self-reviews.
acceptance.verifier: GitHub CI, merge metadata and self-review receipts

approval.note: The user explicitly requested a plan and full implementation after discussing Mermaid and JSON Canvas as additional Schauwerk representation layers.

goal: Implement and live-prove a renderer-routed Schauwerk representation layer that chooses and combines Mermaid, JSON Canvas, Miro-native, table and document outputs from one semantic input.

does_not_establish: Mermaid SVG rendering or browser rendering
lossless Miro projection of all source relations
Miro Space assignment to the Schauwerk space
metadata.outcome: Representation Router v1 is merged and live-proved: one semantic input now yields reasoned Mermaid, JSON Canvas, Miro-native, table and document outputs with deterministic evidence and explicit coverage limits.
metadata.source_request: plan erstellen und umsetzen after evaluating JSON Canvas and Mermaid as additional Schauwerk representation layers

verified_acceptance.deterministic-hybrid-package: Verified by deterministic byte-equality tests and final package receipt e77ab0d0b1beddb4e4058a53c747c7f93db8878059bec13cb29f09650448917d.
verified_acceptance.final-miro-live-proof: Verified by a fresh Education-context board with score 100, zero warnings, zero mismatches and live receipt 343bf110fb197502ae813f3360e9bf6545067689f87652a5c4a2c14ad0a06c18.
verified_acceptance.multi-renderer-output: Verified by the merged CLI, deterministic package manifest and selected formats Mermaid, JSON Canvas, Miro-native, table and document.
verified_acceptance.reasoned-routing: Verified by route-plan tests covering automatic primary choices, hybrid routing and explicit selected/rejected decisions.
verified_acceptance.release-gates: Verified by Schauwerk PRs #89 and #90, four successful CI matrix jobs, tree identity and two bound PASS self-reviews.
verified_acceptance.semantic-input-contract: Verified by the public representation-input.v1 JSON Schema, fixture validation and repository tests.

title: Implement renderer-routed representation packages
